case_reviews.visual_summary: Dense receding military-equipment formation. Predictions recognize the row but drift above or across vehicles, causing both many missed references and many unsupported boxes.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Target dense-formation anchor discipline rather than generic recall loosening.

case_reviews.visual_summary: The model identifies the vehicle formation but produces broad row/span boxes instead of clean boxes around separate visible bodies.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Final boxes must wrap one visibly separate target body, not a visual row.

case_reviews.visual_summary: Recall is strong, but the candidate emits extra row candidates beyond the eight references.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Preserve the recall behavior while adding a final unsupported-extra self-filter for repeated rows.

case_reviews.visual_summary: The model chooses one dominant damaged building/complex while the reference expects three separate building targets.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Preserve separate-building recall, but treat this as secondary to dense military-equipment failures.

case_reviews.visual_summary: The foreground tank is detected, but two small background buildings are missed.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Keep secondary visible targets in scope without reopening broad group or row-placeholder boxes.

case_reviews.visual_summary: One broad building/complex reference is matched, with one extra overlapping/broad prediction.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Retain duplicate/overlap suppression for building complexes.

case_reviews.visual_summary: The corrected positive-control case is handled cleanly with two matches and no false positives or false negatives.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Do not restore old protected-negative semantics for 155.

case_reviews.visual_summary: The case passes, but the reference and prediction are both broad scene-scale building/alley boxes.
case_reviews.prompt_implication: Do not use this pass to justify broad box relaxation.
